items.claim: Cody Gibson is 38 years old and may have lost a step.
items.quote: he may have lost a step cuz he is 38 years old

items.claim: Cody Gibson is a decent enough kickboxer with a not bad ground game.
items.quote: He is a decent enough kickboxer. His ground games not bad.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has nine submission wins, eight of which are in the first round.
items.quote: the guy does have nine submission wins, eight of which are in the first round.
